hero.sectionName: Royal Gujarati Palace Wedding Hero – Kavya & Mihir
hero.html:
🪔 Gujarati Wedding 🪔
🌿 🌼 🌿 🌼 🌿
શુભ વિવાહ
॥ શ્રી ગણેશાય નમઃ ॥
✿
Kavya
&
Mihir
કાવ્યા ✦ મિહિર

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

Date
March 22, 2026
Venue
Akshar Grand Palace
Somerset, New Jersey
View Celebrations RSVP Now
🌿 🌼 🌿 🌼 🌿
જય શ્રી કૃષ્ણ
hero.designNotes: Royal Gujarati Palace Hero for Kavya & Mihir. The layout is built on a warm ivory-to-gold radial gradient evoking palace marble and marigold hues — no image needed. A slowly rotating SVG mandala ring floats behind the content as a subtle background motif. Four filigree corner ornaments frame the viewport in polished gold. The top badge uses a gold pill with diya emoji and animated float. Side panels (hidden on mobile) carry vertical Gujarati text and animated toran leaf garlands to establish cultural depth. The name treatment uses Cormorant Garamond at display scale with a rich gold gradient fill — Kavya and Mihir stacked with an italic ampersand. A Gujarati script name subtitle sits below. The date/venue lives in a frosted glass card with backdrop-blur for premium depth. Two CTAs — a solid gold pill and a ghost variant — anchor the bottom. A rangoli-wave SVG and marigold ornament dividers complete the cultural layering. Fully responsive: side panels collapse on tablet, glass card stacks vertically on mobile, all typography scales fluidly with clamp().
